response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and identified two distinct performances. 2. Performed a web search for "Our Bright Parade Hololive lyrics" and identified the song and artist. 3. Performed a web search for "THE BADDEST Tokoyami Towa lyrics" but did not find official lyric pages for this specific song by this artist. 4. Created the JSON structure based on the findings.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring various Hololive VTubers performing "Our Bright Parade," followed by Tokoyami Towa performing "THE BADDEST."

scenes.description: Multiple Hololive VTubers perform on stage, with the song title 'Our Bright Parade' visible on the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Parade, parade, parade! 
輝くんだよ 呼び合う声を合図に 
Parade, parade, parade! 
探しにゆく スタートは何度だっていいんだよ

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa performs 'THE BADDEST' on a dark stage.
